Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-24 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's dashboard shows two exceptional long-term performers dominating the rankings. AGX ranks #1 with a remarkable 1,668.7% return over 10 years and a score of 95.0, significantly outpacing SPY by 1,416.24% over the same period while maintaining all four moving averages in bullish alignment (sma_all: true). NWPX follows in second place with a 1,470.35% 10-year return and similarly strong momentum ratios across all timeframes, though its 5-year performance (384.73%) lags substantially behind AGX's (1,435.09%), suggesting AGX has accelerated much more recently. Both tickers pass all ratio strength tests and show "strong_buy" signals with clean momentum flags, indicating sustained upward pressure rather than volatile swings. The standout difference is AGX's dramatic outperformance in the 5-year window (1,361.39% vs SPY) compared to NWPX's more moderate 5-year gain (311.03% vs SPY), suggesting AGX has captured a more powerful recent secular trend.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
